creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #45)
> Gerald, can you file a new bug for GCC7 by default? Without an
> exp-run there's nothing to work on.

Sure thing!  We've moved from GCC 4.8 to 4.9 to 5 to 6 in less than
12 months now, catching up quite a bit, and GCC 6 will be maintained
upstream for another year, but indeed GCC 7 is the latest stable
release and some Linux distros, for example, have adopted it already.

Let's see what breaks with that in terms of ports. :-/

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222542 it is.
